__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Ajanta Caves Paintings,Godel's Incompleteness Theorems
|rank=orange
|amount=2
|category=self
|description=Per 6 distinct Souls offered, Snail RUSH +7; Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Distinct Souls Offered]]
